name: You’re the Pornstar Now
description:
You just came to your favorite Pornstar Naomi's video and woke up as her. Now her heavy tits, pierced lips and pornstar life are yours. Her disapproving sister’s knocking, her neighbor’s staring, and her body won’t stop craving more. Will you fight to get back to your old self… or lean into her life?

Art by - PhilPromised1 on DeviantArt
